title: Rat Extermination in SoHo, Manhattan | $350-$600
metaDescription: Professional rat extermination in SoHo, Manhattan. Serving lofts, galleries, and commercial spaces. Fast, effective rodent removal. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: SoHo's historic cast-iron buildings and bustling street-level retail create unique challenges for rat control. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive rat extermination services throughout SoHo, from Broadway lofts to West Broadway galleries, with pricing between $350 and $600 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Our technicians understand SoHo's unique architectural features, including century-old foundations and shared walls between commercial and residential spaces. We provide discreet, effective rat removal that respects your property while eliminating rodent problems completely.
localContext: SoHo's combination of high-end retail, art galleries, and residential lofts along streets like Prince, Spring, and Greene attracts rats due to restaurant waste and aging building infrastructure. The neighborhood's cast-iron buildings and basement access points require specialized knowledge for effective rat exclusion and extermination.

faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in SoHo typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your space, severity of infestation, and number of entry points. Loft spaces and multi-level properties may require additional treatment.

faqs.question: Why are rats so common in SoHo?
faqs.answer: SoHo's high concentration of restaurants, historic buildings with aging infrastructure, and subway access create ideal conditions for rats. The neighborhood's cast-iron buildings often have cracks in foundations and shared walls that provide easy access for rodents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in SoHo?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for SoHo rat emergencies. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood and can quickly reach properties near Houston, Canal, Broadway, and throughout the historic district.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential lofts and commercial spaces in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide rat extermination for all property types in SoHo, including residential lofts, art galleries, retail stores, restaurants, and mixed-use buildings. We understand the unique needs of each space and provide discreet, professional service.
